title: Medical History of Cancers or Benign Tumors from Questionnaire R0
description: Variables from the medical history section of the first round of questionnaire for The Generations Study about the participant's history of other cancers and benign tumors.

StudyID.description: Unique 6-digit identifier for each participant in the study.

OtherCancersBenignTumors.description: Other (non-breast) cancers and benign tumours reported by the participant (up to 3).

R0_OtherCancerBenignTumors_Num.description: Number of other benign cancer tumors instances.

R0_OtherCancerBenignTumor.x-question: Have you ever been diagnosed with this other type of cancer or benign tumour (not including breast cancer), including leukaemia, Hodgkin’s disease or other lymphoma?
R0_OtherCancerBenignTumor.description: Whether the participant was diagnosed with this other (non-breast) cancer or benign tumour.

R0_OtherCancerDiagnosisYr.x-question: If yes, in which year was this other type of cancer or benign tumour diagnosed?
R0_OtherCancerDiagnosisYr.description: Calendar year when this other (non-breast) cancer or benign tumour was diagnosed.

R0_OtherCancerDiagnosisAge.x-question: If yes, at what age was this other type of cancer or benign tumour diagnosed?
R0_OtherCancerDiagnosisAge.description: Participant's age at diagnosis of this other (non-breast) cancer or benign tumour.

R0_OtherCancerBodyPart.x-question: What other type of cancer or benign tumour was it? - Part of body
R0_OtherCancerBodyPart.description: Body site affected by this other (non-breast) cancer or benign tumour, as described by the participant.

R0_OtherCancerType.x-question: What other type of cancer or benign tumour was it? - Type of cancer or tumour
R0_OtherCancerType.description: Type of cancer or benign tumour for this other (non-breast) diagnosis, as described by the participant.

R0_OtherCancerHospital.x-question: At which hospital were you treated for this other type of cancer or benign tumour?
R0_OtherCancerHospital.description: Hospital where treatment for this other (non-breast) cancer or benign tumour took place (PII).

R0_OtherCancerTown.x-question: In which town were you treated for this other type of cancer or benign tumour?
R0_OtherCancerTown.description: Town where treatment for this other (non-breast) cancer or benign tumour took place (PII).

OtherCancersBenignTumorsExtra.description: Other (non-breast) cancers and benign tumours reported by the participant extra information.

R0_OtherCancerOtherBodyPart.x-question: What other type of cancer or benign tumor was it? - 2nd body part
R0_OtherCancerOtherBodyPart.description: Additional body site description for the other (non-breast) cancer/benign tumour.

R0_OtherCancerOtherType.x-question: What other type of cancer or benign tumor was it? - 2nd type of cancer or tumor
R0_OtherCancerOtherType.description: Additional type description for the other (non-breast) cancer/benign tumour.

R0_MoreNonBreastCancers.x-question: If you have been diagnosed with non-breast cancer more than once, please provide details.
R0_MoreNonBreastCancers.description: Flag indicating the participant has had more than one non-breast cancer/benign tumour diagnosis.
